case_title: 250 PROPERTIES, LLC VS. SAMUEL WHITE et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT WHITE, SAMUEL

REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR JUL-16-2007 - CASE SETTLED.

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT SAMUEL WHITE'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. SAMUEL WHITE HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL FEES AND COST PICKED UP BY APPLICANT AND SENT TO ALL OTHER PARTIES. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: DLOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR #4280 (206)

Appearances:
No agent appeared on behalf of plaintiff 250 Properties, LLC.
Edward C. Singer, Jr. representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Samuel White is present.
Bill Shapiro representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case has settled, the trial date is off calendar.

This case did not settle, the trial date remains set.
